bri_98a03fa8f325.edit_prompt:
Siraj's soft-life season has officially begun

Shop sleepwear that never pinches recovery scars or cuts into changing bodies. TENCEL Modal that stays cloud-soft wash after wash, with ultra-gentle bands that move with you. Made by a Black woman who knows these bodies deserve better.

CTA: Shop the three-piece sets

Shot list:
1. Close-up of ultra-wide, gentle elastic waistband being stretched gently by hands
2. TENCEL Modal fabric flowing through fingers in slow motion
3. Black woman in Petal set stretching arms overhead, fabric moving seamlessly
4. Quick montage: washing machine, then same fabric being touched - still soft
5. Side profile showing how waistband sits without cutting in
6. Three colorways (Petal/Daisy/Oat) laid flat on bed
7. Woman settling into bed, fabric draping naturally
8. Product shot with 'TENCEL Modal' text overlay

brief_json.hook: Siraj's soft-life season has officially begun
brief_json.body: Shop sleepwear that never pinches recovery scars or cuts into changing bodies. TENCEL Modal that stays cloud-soft wash after wash, with ultra-gentle bands that move with you. Made by a Black woman who knows these bodies deserve better.
shot_list: 1. Close-up of ultra-wide, gentle elastic waistband being stretched gently by hands
2. TENCEL Modal fabric flowing through fingers in slow motion
3. Black woman in Petal set stretching arms overhead, fabric moving seamlessly
4. Quick montage: washing machine, then same fabric being touched - still soft
5. Side profile showing how waistband sits without cutting in
6. Three colorways (Petal/Daisy/Oat) laid flat on bed
7. Woman settling into bed, fabric draping naturally
8. Product shot with 'TENCEL Modal' text overlay
brief_json.belief_to_shift: I have to choose between sleepwear that looks good and sleepwear that won't hurt my body or hold up over time
brief_json.evidence_to_use: TENCEL Modal fabric, founder Shantay's lived experience, ultra-gentle elastic bands

bri_db464d694ae1.edit_prompt:
Soft life season has officially begun

You know that feeling when your body is still holding the day but your mind is ready to let go. That's where most sleepwear fails us. TENCEL Modal moves with your skin like it was always meant to be there. Three pieces that tell your nervous system the workday is over.

CTA: Shop the transition

Shot list:
1. Close-up of hands untying work blazer, camera follows movement down
2. Quick cut to TENCEL Modal fabric flowing in slow motion against skin
3. Wide shot of model transitioning from work clothes to Petal set in bedroom
4. Extreme close-up of fabric texture against collarbone, showing drape
5. Medium shot of model sitting on bed edge, shoulders visibly relaxing
6. Close-up of hands smoothing fabric over thighs, emphasizing fit
7. Final wide shot of model lying back, body language completely at ease
8. Product flat lay of all three colorways with soft lighting

5. Medium shot of model sitting on bed edge, shoulders visibly relaxing
6. Close-up of hands smoothing fabric over thighs, emphasizing fit
7. Final wide shot of model lying back, body language completely at ease
8. Product flat lay of all three colorways with soft lighting
brief_json.belief_to_shift: Good sleepwear is just about looking cute rather than actually helping your body transition from day to night.
brief_json.evidence_to_use: TENCEL Modal fabric technology and three-piece construction designed specifically for Black women's bodies

bri_7fe76901d37b.edit_prompt:
Wedding season is here and we're done with those basic robes

Every bride deserves sleepwear that actually fits her body, not just fits the aesthetic. Our TENCEL Modal sets are what your girls will reach for long after the honeymoon photos fade. Soft enough for sensitive skin, cut for curves that bridesmaid robes ignore.

CTA: Shop the bridal edit

Shot list:
1. Close-up of hands tossing a wrinkled satin robe into a drawer
2. Quick montage of ill-fitting bridesmaid robes on different body types
3. Founder Shantay holding up a Petal three-piece set against natural light
4. Slow-motion fabric drape showing TENCEL Modal's fluid movement
5. Black woman in Daisy set stretching comfortably in bed
6. Side-by-side: drawer full of forgotten robes vs. woman reaching for Siraj set
7. Three sets (Petal, Daisy, Oat) laid out with wedding invitation
8. Woman in Oat set looking confident in mirror, natural morning light

bri_a2ef9f91151f.edit_prompt:
Soft girl season has officially begun

While other brands were building sleepwear for bodies that don't look like ours, Shantay was designing TENCEL Modal sets that actually fit. Three pieces that move with your curves, not against them. Petal, Daisy, and Oat colorways that complement melanin instead of washing it out.

CTA: Shop the soft girl essentials

Shot list:
1. Close-up of Black woman's face waking up naturally, golden hour lighting through window
2. Wide shot of her stretching in bed wearing the Petal set, fabric flowing with movement
3. Detail shot of TENCEL Modal fabric texture against brown skin
4. Medium shot of her sitting cross-legged on bed in Daisy set, looking content
5. Quick cuts of all three colorways laid out on neutral bedding
6. Her walking to kitchen in Oat set, fabric moving naturally with her body
7. Text overlay: 'Made by a Black woman, for bodies the category forgot'
8. Final shot of Siraj Beauty logo with three sets displayed

bri_380dd264cfd3.edit_prompt:
The moment your body realizes the workday is actually over

You know that feeling when you finally peel off your work clothes and your shoulders drop for the first time all day. But then you throw on whatever's clean and your body stays stuck in daytime mode. TENCEL Modal three-pieces that signal to every cell that it's time to soften. Made by a Black woman who knows our bodies deserve the transition ritual we never got.

CTA: Shop the ritual

Shot list:
1. Close-up of hands unbuttoning a work shirt, shoulders visibly tense
2. Quick cut to throwing random cotton shorts and oversized tee on bed
3. Slow reveal of Siraj three-piece set laid out - the fabric catching light
4. Hands touching the TENCEL Modal fabric, fingers lingering on the texture
5. Medium shot of woman sliding into the set, shoulders visibly dropping
6. Close-up of her face as she exhales deeply, eyes closing in relief
7. Wide shot of her moving through evening routine, fabric flowing naturally
8. Final frame: 'Sleepwear made by a Black woman, for bodies the category never built for'

brief_json.hook: The moment your body realizes the workday is actually over
brief_json.body: You know that feeling when you finally peel off your work clothes and your shoulders drop for the first time all day. But then you throw on whatever's clean and your body stays stuck in daytime mode. TENCEL Modal three-pieces that signal to every cell that it's time to soften. Made by a Black woman who knows our bodies deserve the transition ritual we never got.
shot_list: 1. Close-up of hands unbuttoning a work shirt, shoulders visibly tense
2. Quick cut to throwing random cotton shorts and oversized tee on bed
3. Slow reveal of Siraj three-piece set laid out - the fabric catching light
4. Hands touching the TENCEL Modal fabric, fingers lingering on the texture
5. Medium shot of woman sliding into the set, shoulders visibly dropping
6. Close-up of her face as she exhales deeply, eyes closing in relief
7. Wide shot of her moving through evening routine, fabric flowing naturally
8. Final frame: 'Sleepwear made by a Black woman, for bodies the category never built for'
brief_json.belief_to_shift: Any clean sleepwear will do the job of signaling bedtime to my body
brief_json.evidence_to_use: TENCEL Modal fabric properties, founder Shantay's perspective as Black woman designer, three-piece ritual concept

bri_bc1d9bf64656.edit_prompt:
Bridesmaid robes that live in a drawer versus sleepwear that becomes your ritual

Those satin robes hit different when they're sitting unused while you're still in old college tees. Your milestone moments deserve TENCEL Modal that feels like silk but moves with your actual life. Three pieces that layer from ceremony prep to honeymoon mornings to Sunday slowness.

CTA: Shop the ritual

Shot list:
1. Split screen: wilted bridesmaid robe hanging forgotten vs. woman in Petal set stretching in morning light
2. Close-up: hands feeling the TENCEL Modal fabric texture
3. Wide shot: woman in Daisy set preparing tea in kitchen, natural movement
4. Detail: three-piece set laid out on bed, showing versatility
5. Medium shot: woman in Oat set reading by window, afternoon light
6. Close-up: founder Shantay's hands adjusting fabric on model
7. Wide shot: woman in complete Petal set walking through bedroom
8. Product shot: all three colorways displayed with 'Made by a Black woman' text overlay

bri_943c03699999.edit_prompt:
Soft girl season has officially begun

For too long, Black women have been told to choose hustle over rest, productivity over pleasure. But sleepwear that actually fits our curves and honors our need for softness changes everything. TENCEL Modal that moves with your body, not against it. Three pieces that let you exist beautifully, unapologetically.

CTA: Shop the soft life collection

Shot list:
1. Close-up of hands smoothing TENCEL Modal fabric with text overlay 'Soft girl season has officially begun'
2. Black woman stretching luxuriously in Petal three-piece set, morning light streaming through window
3. Fabric detail shot showing the drape and flow of the modal against brown skin
4. Woman curled up reading in Daisy set, completely relaxed and content
5. Quick montage: Oat set laid out beautifully, then worn while making tea
6. Close-up of woman's peaceful face, eyes closed, in the sleepwear
7. Full body shot showing how the three pieces fit and move together
8. Product flat lay with 'Siraj Beauty' logo and 'Shop the soft life collection'

brief_json.hook: Soft girl season has officially begun
brief_json.body: For too long, Black women have been told to choose hustle over rest, productivity over pleasure. But sleepwear that actually fits our curves and honors our need for softness changes everything. TENCEL Modal that moves with your body, not against it. Three pieces that let you exist beautifully, unapologetically.
shot_list: 1. Close-up of hands smoothing TENCEL Modal fabric with text overlay 'Soft girl season has officially begun'
2. Black woman stretching luxuriously in Petal three-piece set, morning light streaming through window
3. Fabric detail shot showing the drape and flow of the modal against brown skin
4. Woman curled up reading in Daisy set, completely relaxed and content
5. Quick montage: Oat set laid out beautifully, then worn while making tea
6. Close-up of woman's peaceful face, eyes closed, in the sleepwear
7. Full body shot showing how the three pieces fit and move together
8. Product flat lay with 'Siraj Beauty' logo and 'Shop the soft life collection'
brief_json.belief_to_shift: Black women must choose between being successful and being soft, when luxury sleepwear should support both identities.
brief_json.evidence_to_use: TENCEL Modal fabric technology, three-piece set design, Shantay as Black founder, body-inclusive sizing philosophy

bri_1f89ed20ec6d.edit_prompt:
The sleepwear that actually makes sense outside your bedroom

Finally, pieces that honor the aesthetic you've built everywhere else. TENCEL Modal that moves with your body, cuts designed for curves the category ignores. Three pieces that work together or apart, from morning coffee runs to late-night self-care rituals. Soft life energy in Petal, Daisy, and Oat.

CTA: Shop the three-piece sets

Shot list:
1. Close-up of hands smoothing TENCEL Modal fabric against skin
2. Wide shot: woman in mismatched old sleepwear looking disconnected from her curated space
3. Quick cuts: Siraj three-piece set laid out in Petal, Daisy, Oat colorways
4. Transform shot: same woman now in Siraj set, confident posture, cohesive with her aesthetic
5. Detail shots: fabric draping on curves, proper fit at bust and hips
6. Lifestyle moment: wearing the set while opening curtains, natural morning light
7. Split screen: bedroom aesthetic matching living room aesthetic, seamless transition
8. Final frame: product flat lay with 'By Shantay, for bodies like yours' text overlay

brief_json.hook: The sleepwear that actually makes sense outside your bedroom
brief_json.body: Finally, pieces that honor the aesthetic you've built everywhere else. TENCEL Modal that moves with your body, cuts designed for curves the category ignores. Three pieces that work together or apart, from morning coffee runs to late-night self-care rituals. Soft life energy in Petal, Daisy, and Oat.
shot_list: 1. Close-up of hands smoothing TENCEL Modal fabric against skin
2. Wide shot: woman in mismatched old sleepwear looking disconnected from her curated space
3. Quick cuts: Siraj three-piece set laid out in Petal, Daisy, Oat colorways
4. Transform shot: same woman now in Siraj set, confident posture, cohesive with her aesthetic
5. Detail shots: fabric draping on curves, proper fit at bust and hips
6. Lifestyle moment: wearing the set while opening curtains, natural morning light
7. Split screen: bedroom aesthetic matching living room aesthetic, seamless transition
8. Final frame: product flat lay with 'By Shantay, for bodies like yours' text overlay
brief_json.belief_to_shift: Sleepwear is just functional clothing that doesn't need to align with my personal aesthetic or fit properly.
brief_json.evidence_to_use: TENCEL Modal fabric, three-piece sets, founder Shantay, designed for Black women's bodies
